details.title: Retro Pilkki
details.description:
Keeping it reel 🎣
Catch fish to keep the timer going!
For the best experience, play on mobile. 

3RD PRIZE WINNER  
 QUICK PLAY GAME JAM 2022


------------------------------

Controls:

Swipe or Click & Drag up/down to reel
Swipe or Click & Drag left/right to swing
Reel up to go back to menu
------------------------------
Description:
Pilkki is a physics-based ice fishing game.  Try to catch as many fish as you can before the day runs out. Luckily, time seems to slow down when you have fun - and catching fish is fun, right? Be careful not to lose all your hooks though!
This game was made in 6 weeks for the Quickplay 2022 Game Jam. The theme of the jam was "Tradition." Ice fishing is a big tradition in Finland, and as Comfie is Finnish, we just had to make a fun little game about it!

------------------------------
Credits:

Game Engine: Unity 2021.3.1f1

Game Design & Programming by Namida Sai

Art, VFX & Audio by "Comfie"
Music by Abstraction

details.title: Pulang Kampung
details.description:
Travel through perilous obstacles, face various dangers, and meet new friends in this fantasy endless runner -roguelike hybrid game based on the traditions of Mudik where you strive to reach back to your ancestral land after living far away. 


Watch your food supplies, fight (or avoid) dark spirits and dangerous foes, encounter various events…
Safe Travels!The game was made during the Quick Play 2022.

Feel the quiet horror as you wander through the corridors where maniacs and madmen are waiting for you. Travel through a hellish hotel in roguelike style with turn-based battles and ruthless choices. Experiment in choosing different events to discover new forms of atmospheric horror in each playthrough.

game.title: SoulPango
game.short_text: Mobile vertical scroll physics platform and shooting

details.title: SoulPango
details.description:
She uses the kites, to reach the sky...
Every now and then,
a few souls get lost,
not reaching the sky,
they need to go high
but the risk too lost track,
make some soul crack.
She appears in place,
young and happy,
give the best, 
the path ahead
so, the souls can rest,
in a quieter place.
1 November all the souls that are stock in the earth has a chance to go up and rest. but some of them has trouble to reach the sky, you are a soul guide with one job, lead the way so they can finally rest in peace. every soul			has his story, every soul has right to rest after they give their best.Nixiq is a Soul guider who dies feeling lost, and when you find the way to past to the afterlife, she refuses because was so hard and difficult to her, that she decides to help other soul to reach the sky. 
- Throw Nixiq to the kites and guide a lost soul to the nearest place of rest.
- Purify the area so the soul can reach a proper rest
- Hand draw graphics and intuitive controls
* Android Cellphone.Download on Android, activate "Developer Mode"... Then install. Enjoy

details.title: Mateman
details.description:
MATEMAN: Join the round
Game Description
A mobile game designed around the southamerican tradition of drinking mate tea.Mate is a hot infusion that is drunk in groups. There is a person who is the "cebador", who pours mates and shares them in turns to each member of the round. In our culture, sharing some matecitos is a synonym of communion and fellowship.Mateman fights growing intolerance and polarization by sharing mates with people of different interests.It's an overcooked-like game, where you have to gather angry NPCs of different interests and postures and share some mates between them before intolerance grows!Disclaimer: some testers reported that the "tutorial" of level 1 did not appear and that they could not move. As far as we know, it depends of the device where the game is running. We ll be working on that.

details.title: The Song to the Snow
details.description:
THE MIX: SYNCRETISM
On July 28, 1821, the independence of Peru from the Spanish monarchy was declared, marking the most important chapter in the history of the Latin American wars of independence.
Recently, Peru has celebrated 200 years of independence, however, it is undeniable that the native Peruvian culture has been indelibly marked with Spanish traditions, producing a fusion that encompasses all cultural manifestations. This is what we call syncretism.
For example, the set of elements of Catholicism and the cult of pre-Hispanic gods influence the identity of the different traditions of Peru and, in general, of all Latin American customs.
Our team has decided to capture this syncretism in a video game project. This is intended to represent a tributary tradition of this mixture or fusion of cultural artifacts.
The tradition that we have chosen, due to its representativeness and history, is the pilgrimage of the Lord of Qoylluriti (lord of the snow star). This festivity consists of a massive pilgrimage to the snowy peaks of the Peruvian Andes, in the Vilcanota mountain range.




THE GAME
The Song to the Snow is a musical game that develops the story of a musician and the challenges he must face to save and commemorate the tradition of the Lord of Qoylluriti, because, over the years, it has been forgotten by the younger.
Through songs and music, the main character faces the challenge of transmitting the importance of the tradition of pilgrimage to the snow-capped mountain and sanctuary of the Lord of Qoylluriti.




STATEMENT
The game also highlights an unquestionable reality: that referring to the dangers and detrimental effects that climate change generates on nature and the loss of cultural heritage. The main character will face one last situation in which he will discover the environmental damage and its relationship with his traditions.

game.title: Citas con Monstruos. Dating with Monters

details.title: Citas con Monstruos. Dating with Monters
details.description:
Dating with Monsters is a visual novel in which you will play the role of a university historian determined to learn about and collect the lives of the myths that inhabit the city.

The monsters of the legends have settled among us, trying to lead a normal but discreet life. Your job is to collect their stories so that the tradition does not fall into oblivion.

The objective is to learn about the legend of the monsters and develop deep relationships with them that allow us to discover their secrets. It is a way of delving into the tradition and folklore of the Spanish bestiary (and Latin American in the final version).

Citas con Monstruos es una novela visual en la que interpretarás el papel de historiador universitario decidido a conocer y recopilar las vidas de los mitos que habitan en la ciudad. 
Los monstruos de las leyendas se han asentado entre nosotros, tratando de llevar una vida normal aunque discreta. Tu labor es recopilar sus historias para que la tradición no caiga en el olvido.

El objetivo conocer la leyenda de los monstruos y desarrollar relaciones profundas con ellos que nos permitan conocer sus secretos. Es una forma de adentrarse en la tradición y el folklore del bestiario español (y latinoamericano en la versión final).



(Check the pitch pdf document to know more)
IMPORTANT: If you installed the v1, you need to uninstall completely and install the v2.Download the APK and install in your Android Device
IMPORTANT: If you installed the v1, you need to uninstall completely and install the v2.

Here grab these guitar

To play it you need to press the strings while strumming them with the other hand like this.

wait the next instrument


to play it, touch the note before time is up

wait the next instrument 

to play it only shake your phone!

be the best mariachi and say!

details.title: D.I. Sagree
details.description:
Act I: Wake Up Call
Join D.I. Sagree as his partner in this Film Noir -style narrative adventure game!
Made in one month for Quick Play 2022 Game Jam. Due to jam's rules, there's only an Android build available.
The theme for the jam was "Tradition". We incorporated this theme in two ways:
1. We used the traditions of Film Noir, with a heavy-drinking, hard-boiled detective as the protagonist, and a femme fatale, and of course the visual style and music.
2. We explore the tradition of player-character interactions, where usually the protagonist of a game follows the players commands without question. Sagree is strong-willed, and often outright refuses to do what the player wants. Player will have to coax, pressure, force or manipulate him.
Made by two Finnish developers:
Jorava - Game Design, Story, Code, Sound Design, Music (Piano Improvisation)JapeNess - 3D-Modelling, Rigging, Animations, Lighting, Music (Arrangement and Production)
You'll need to have Android 11 or newer. At least 4GB memory.When installing, you'll get a warning, since we signed the build ourselves, but we promise we didn't put any malware in it!

moreInfo.Tags: Atmospheric, construct-3, Dark, Detective, Funny, Male protagonist, metafiction, Mystery, Noir, Singleplayer

details.title: blacksmith trial
details.description:
blacksmith trial is a puzzle game based on reconstructing  statues in which speed, memory and the ability to recognize shapes at a glance are rewarded.
In this game, you have to face a traditional trial that the player, a son of the blacksmith god, has to get over to be recognized as an adult in the heaven world. In this trial, the player has to reforge a series of ancient sacred statues that are a memory of an old civilization.
